entries.name: Shiv
entries.desc:
Attack with your off-hand, dealing 2 Physical damage, dispelling all enrage effects and applying a concentrated form of your active Non-Lethal poison.

Awards 1 combo point.

entries.name: Blind
entries.desc: Blinds the target, causing it to wander disoriented for 1 min. Damage may interrupt the effect. Limit 1.

entries.name: Cloak of Shadows
entries.desc: Provides a moment of magic immunity, instantly removing all harmful spell effects. The cloak lingers, causing you to resist harmful spells for 5 sec.

entries.name: Toxic Stiletto
entries.desc: Shiv's Energy cost is reduced by 20, its cooldown is reduced by 15 sec, and its range is increased by 3 yds.

entries.name: Fleet Footed
entries.desc: Movement speed increased by 15%.

entries.name: Gouge
entries.desc:
Gouges the eyes of an enemy target, incapacitating for 4 sec. Damage may interrupt the effect.

Must be in front of your target.

Awards 1 combo point.

entries.name: Airborne Irritant
entries.desc: Blind has 50% reduced cooldown, 70% reduced duration, and applies to all nearby enemies.

entries.name: Thrill Seeking
entries.desc: Shadowstep has 1 additional charge.

entries.name: Shadowrunner
entries.desc: While Stealth or Shadow Dance is active, you move 20% faster.

entries.name: Master Poisoner
entries.desc: Increases the non-damaging effects of your weapon poisons by 20%.

entries.name: Elusiveness
entries.desc: Evasion also reduces damage taken by 20%, and Feint also reduces non-area-of-effect damage taken by 20%.

entries.name: Cheat Death
entries.desc: Fatal attacks instead reduce you to 7% of your maximum health. For 3 sec afterward, you take 85% reduced damage. Cannot trigger more often than once per 6 min.

entries.name: Tricks of the Trade
entries.desc: Redirects all threat you cause to the targeted party or raid member, beginning with your next damaging attack within the next 30 sec and lasting 6 sec.

entries.name: Blackjack
entries.desc: Enemies have 30% reduced damage and healing for 6 sec after Blind or Sap's effect on them ends.

entries.name: Improved Wound Poison
entries.desc: Wound Poison can now stack 2 additional times.

entries.name: Nimble Fingers
entries.desc: Energy cost of Feint and Crimson Vial reduced by 10.

entries.name: Deadened Nerves
entries.desc: Physical damage taken reduced by 5%.

entries.name: Quick Fingers
entries.desc: Increases your Agility by 3%.

entries.name: Improved Sprint
entries.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Sprint by 60 sec.

entries.name: Superior Mixture
entries.desc: Crippling Poison reduces movement speed by an additional 10%.

entries.name: Evasion
entries.desc: Increases your dodge chance by 100% for 10 sec.

entries.name: Iron Stomach
entries.desc: Increases the healing you receive from Crimson Vial, healing potions, and healthstones by 25%.

entries.name: Virulent Poisons
entries.desc: Increases the damage of your weapon poisons by 10%.

entries.name: Stillshroud
entries.desc: Shroud of Concealment has 50% reduced cooldown.

entries.name: Graceful Guile
entries.desc: Feint has 1 additional charge.

entries.name: Featherfoot
entries.desc: Sprint increases movement speed by an additional 30% and has 4 sec increased duration.

entries.name: Numbing Poison
entries.desc: Coats your weapons with a Non-Lethal Poison that lasts for 1 hour. Each strike has a 30% chance of poisoning the enemy, clouding their mind and slowing their attack and casting speed by 15% for 10 sec.

entries.name: Atrophic Poison
entries.desc: Coats your weapons with a Non-Lethal Poison that lasts for 1 hour. Each strike has a 30% chance of poisoning the enemy, reducing their damage by 3.0% for 10 sec.

entries.name: Deadly Precision
entries.desc: Increases the critical strike chance of your attacks that generate combo points by 5%.

entries.name: Sanguine Vial
entries.desc: When you deal the killing blow to a target that yields experience or honor, the cooldown of Crimson Vial is reduced by 15 sec and your next use heals 5% of your health instantly.

entries.name: Deep Cuts
entries.desc: Your finishing moves deal 6% increased damage.

entries.name: Unbreakable Stride
entries.desc: Reduces the duration of movement slowing effects 30%.

entries.name: Danger Sense
entries.desc: You have a 20% chance to partially evade any damage dealt to you, reducing the damage it deals by 20%.

entries.name: Swift Slasher
entries.desc: Slice and Dice grants additional attack speed equal to 100% of your Haste.

entries.name: Improved Ambush
entries.desc: Ambush generates 1 additional combo point.

entries.name: Tight Spender
entries.desc: Energy cost of finishing moves reduced by 6%.

entries.name: Leeching Poison
entries.desc: Adds a Leeching effect to your Lethal poisons, granting you 3.0% Leech.

entries.name: Lethality
entries.desc: Critical strike chance increased by 1%. Critical strike damage bonus of your attacks that generate combo points increased by 10%.

entries.name: Recuperator
entries.desc: Slice and Dice heals you for up to 1% of your maximum health per 3 sec.

entries.name: Alacrity
entries.desc: Haste increased by 1.5%.

entries.name: Soothing Darkness
entries.desc: You are healed for 30% of your maximum health over 6 sec after activating Vanish.

entries.name: Vigor
entries.desc: Increases your maximum Energy by 50 and Energy regeneration by 5%.

entries.name: Supercharger
entries.desc:
Kingsbane supercharges 1 combo point.

Damaging finishing moves consume a supercharged combo point to function as if they spent 2 additional combo points.

entries.name: Subterfuge
entries.desc:
Abilities requiring Stealth can be used for 3 sec after Stealth breaks.

Combat benefits requiring Stealth persist for an additional 3 sec after Stealth breaks.

entries.name: Thistle Tea
entries.desc:
Restore 100 Energy.

When your Energy is reduced below 30, drink a Thistle Tea.

entries.name: Cold Blooded Killer
entries.desc: Critically striking with an attack that generates combo points increases the critical strike chance of your next finishing move by 10%.

entries.name: Echoing Reprimand
entries.desc: After consuming a supercharged combo point, your next Mutilate also strikes the target with an Echoing Reprimand dealing 40 Physical damage.

entries.name: Forced Induction
entries.desc: Increase the bonus granted when a damaging finishing move consumes a supercharged combo point by 1.

entries.name: Deeper Stratagem
entries.desc:
Gain 1 additional max combo point.

Your finishing moves that consume more than 5 combo points have increased effects, and your finishing moves deal 5% increased damage.

entries.name: Without a Trace
entries.desc: Vanish has 1 additional charge.

entries.name: Find Weakness
entries.desc: Your Stealth abilities allow you to see the flaws in enemies' defenses, causing your attacks to ignore 30% armor for 10 sec.

entries.name: Improved Backstab
entries.desc:
Backstab has 15% increased critical strike chance.

While behind your target, Backstab critical strikes grant Find Weakness for 10 sec.

entries.name: Shadow Blades
entries.desc: Draws upon surrounding shadows to empower your weapons, causing your attacks to deal 20% additional damage as Shadow and causing your combo point generating abilities to generate double combo points for 16 sec.

entries.name: Improved Shuriken Storm
entries.desc:
Shuriken Storm has 15% increased critical strike chance.

Shuriken Storm critical strikes grant Find Weakness for 10 sec.

entries.name: Premeditation
entries.desc: After entering Stealth, your next combo point generating ability generates full combo points.

entries.name: Quick Decisions
entries.desc: Shadowstep's cooldown is reduced by 20%, and its maximum range is increased by 20%.

entries.name: Ephemeral Bond
entries.desc: Increases healing received by 8%.

entries.name: Silent Storm
entries.desc: Gaining Stealth, Vanish, or Shadow Dance causes your next Shuriken Storm to have 100% increased chance to critically strike.

entries.name: Shrouded in Darkness
entries.desc: Shroud of Concealment increases the movement speed of allies by 100% and leaving its area no longer cancels the effect.

entries.name: Shot in the Dark
entries.desc: After using Vanish or Shadow Dance, your next Cheap Shot is free and ignores its cooldown.

entries.name: Exhilarating Execution
entries.desc: Your finishing moves heal you for 5% of damage done. At full health gain shielding instead, absorbing up to 10% of your maximum health.

entries.name: Cloaked in Shadows
entries.desc: Vanish grants you a shield for 6 sec, absorbing damage equal to 18% of your maximum health.

entries.name: Fade to Nothing
entries.desc: Movement speed increased by 20% and damage taken reduced by 10% for 8 sec after gaining Stealth, Vanish, or Shadow Dance.

entries.name: Night Terrors
entries.desc: Shuriken Storm reduces enemies' movement speed by 50% for 8 sec.

entries.name: Terrifying Pace
entries.desc: Shuriken Storm increases your movement speed by 30% for 3 sec when striking 3 or more enemies.

entries.name: Master of Shadows
entries.desc: Gain 30 Energy over 3 sec when you enter Stealth or activate Shadow Dance.

entries.name: Gloomblade
entries.desc:
Punctures your target with your shadow-infused blade for 42 Shadow damage, bypassing armor.

Awards 1 combo point.

entries.name: Shadow Focus
entries.desc: Abilities deal 10% more damage while Stealth or Shadow Dance is active.

entries.name: Improved Secret Technique
entries.desc: Secret Technique damage increased by 15%.

entries.name: Relentless Strikes
entries.desc: Your finishing moves generate 5 Energy per combo point spent.

entries.name: Weaponmaster
entries.desc: Backstab and Shadowstrike have a 15% chance to create a Shadow Clone that repeats the attack for 50% of normal damage as Shadow.

entries.name: Planned Execution
entries.desc: Shadow Dance increases the critical strike damage bonus of your abilities by 10%.

entries.name: Warning Signs
entries.desc: Shadow Dance increases attack speed by 25%.

entries.name: Double Dance
entries.desc: Shadow Dance has 1 additional charge.

entries.name: Shadowed Finishers
entries.desc: Eviscerate and Black Powder deal an additional 30% damage as Shadow while Find Weakness is active.

entries.name: Secret Stratagem
entries.desc:
Gain 1 additional max combo point.

Your finishing moves that consume more than 5 combo points have increased effects, and your finishing moves deal 5% increased damage.

entries.name: Shuriken Tornado
entries.desc: Shuriken Storm has a 15% chance to create a Shadow Clone that repeats the attack for 50% of normal damage as Shadow.

entries.name: Umbral Edge
entries.desc:
Shadow Clones deal 15% increased damage.

Cheap Shot creates a Shadow Clone to Shadowstrike the target for 50% of normal damage as Shadow.

Kidney Shot creates a Shadow Clone to Eviscerate the target for 50% of normal damage as Shadow.

entries.name: The First Dance
entries.desc: Remaining out of combat for 6 sec increases the duration of your next Shadow Dance by 3 sec.

entries.name: Deepening Shadows
entries.desc:
Shadow Dance duration is increased by 150% of your Haste stat.

Current bonus duration: 0.00 sec

entries.name: Veiltouched
entries.desc: Your abilities deal 5% increased magic damage.

entries.name: Replicating Shadows
entries.desc: Shadow Clones deal 15% increased damage and your effects that have a chance to create them have 5% additional chance to occur.

entries.name: Improved Find Weakness
entries.desc: Find Weakness causes your attacks to ignore an additional 20% armor.

entries.name: Perforated Veins
entries.desc: Backstab, Shuriken Storm, and Shadowstrike have 10% increased damage while Find Weakness is active.

entries.name: Lingering Shadow
entries.desc: After Shadow Dance ends, Backstab deals an additional 50% damage as Shadow, fading by 2.8% per sec.

entries.name: Deeper Daggers
entries.desc: Shadow damage increased by 8%.

entries.name: Potent Powder
entries.desc: Black Powder deals increased damage equal to 20% of your Mastery when it spends 5 or more combo points.

entries.name: Death Perception
entries.desc:
Find Weakness increases the damage of finishing moves by 5%.

Shadow Dance increases the damage of finishing moves by 5%.

Shadow Blades increases the damage of finishing moves by 5%.

entries.name: Dark Shadow
entries.desc: Shadow Dance increases all ability damage by 5%, and Shadowstrike and Shuriken Storm damage by an additional 5%.

entries.name: Finality
entries.desc: Eviscerate and Black Powder have 15% increased critical strike damage bonus.

entries.name: The Rotten
entries.desc: After activating Shadow Dance, your next 2 attacks that generate combo points deal 35% increased damage.

entries.name: Shadowcraft
entries.desc: While Shadow Dance is active, your Shadow Techniques triggers 40% more frequently, stores 1 additional combo point, and generates 2 additional Energy.

entries.name: Danse Macabre
entries.desc: While Shadow Dance is active, each different attack that generates or spends combo points lashes out at the target, dealing 145 Shadow damage.

entries.name: Goremaw's Bite
entries.desc:
Lashes out at the target, inflicting 114 Shadow damage and causing your next 3 finishing moves to cost no Energy.

Awards 3 combo points.

entries.name: Dark Brew
entries.desc:
Your weapon poisons have 10% increased application chance and now deal damage as Shadow instead of Nature.

Shadow damage increased by 10%.

entries.name: Ancient Arts
entries.desc: Damaging attacks that expend Shadow Techniques to generate combo points have a 15% chance per stack expended to create a Shadow Clone that repeats the attack for 50% of normal damage as Shadow.

entries.name: Flawless Form
entries.desc: Unseen Blade and Secret Technique increase the damage of your finishing moves by 4% for 12 sec. Max 5 stacks.

entries.name: Coup de Grace
entries.desc: After 4 strikes with Unseen Blade, your next Eviscerate will be performed as a Coup de Grace, functioning as if it had consumed 5 additional combo points, and granting you 5 stacks of Flawless Form.

entries.name: Cloud Cover
entries.desc:
Activating Shadow Blades creates a cloud of smoke for 6 sec, allowing attacks from within the cloud to apply Fazed, stacking up to 2 additional times.

Effect persists for 6 sec after leaving the cloud.

entries.name: No Scruples
entries.desc: Finishing moves have 12% increased chance to critically strike Fazed targets.

entries.name: Disorienting Strikes
entries.desc: Secret Technique has 10% reduced cooldown and allows your next 2 strikes of Unseen Blade to ignore its cooldown.

entries.name: Surprising Strikes
entries.desc: Attacks that generate combo points deal 50% increased critical strike damage to Fazed targets.

entries.name: Nimble Flurry
entries.desc: Your auto-attacks, Unseen Blade, and Coup de Grace also strike up to 7 nearby enemies for 50% of normal damage while Flawless Form is active.

entries.name: Devious Distractions
entries.desc: Secret Technique applies Fazed to any targets struck.

entries.name: So Tricky
entries.desc: Tricks of the Trade's threat redirect duration is increased to 1 hour.

entries.name: Don't Be Suspicious
entries.desc:
Blind and Shroud of Concealment have 10% reduced cooldown.

Pick Pocket and Sap have 10 yd increased range.

entries.name: Thousand Cuts
entries.desc: Slice and Dice grants 10% additional attack speed and gives your auto-attacks a chance to refresh your opportunity to strike with Unseen Blade.

entries.name: Flickerstrike
entries.desc:
Taking damage from an area-of-effect attack while Feint is active or dodging while Evasion is active refreshes your opportunity to strike with Unseen Blade.

This effect may only occur once every 5 sec.

entries.name: Unseen Blade
entries.desc:
Backstab and Shadowstrike now also strike with an Unseen Blade dealing 99 damage. Targets struck are Fazed for 10 sec.

Fazed enemies take 5% more damage from you and cannot parry your attacks.

This effect may occur once every 20 sec.

entries.name: Smoke
entries.desc: You take 5% reduced damage from Fazed targets.

entries.name: Mirrors
entries.desc: Feint reduces damage taken from area-of-effect attacks by an additional 10%

entries.name: Clever Combatant
entries.desc: Shuriken Storm has 10% increased critical strike chance and now triggers Unseen Blade when available.

entries.name: Flashing Steel
entries.desc: Unseen Blade may now occur once every 15 sec and has 25% chance to strike twice.

entries.name: Hoodwink
entries.desc: Fazed increases damage taken by an additional 3%.

entries.name: Ethereal Cloak
entries.desc: Cloak of Shadows duration increased by 2 sec.

entries.name: Bait and Switch
entries.desc:
Evasion reduces magical damage taken by 15%. 

Cloak of Shadows reduces physical damage taken by 20%.

entries.name: Corrupt the Blood
entries.desc: Rupture damage increased by 20%.

entries.name: Lingering Darkness
entries.desc: After Deathmark expires, gain 30% increased Nature damage for 30 sec.

entries.name: Symbolic Victory
entries.desc: Shadow Dance additionally increases the damage of your next Eviscerate or Black Powder by 15%.

entries.name: Clear the Witnesses
entries.desc: Fan of Knives damage increased by 60%.

entries.name: Singular Focus
entries.desc: Damage dealt to targets other than your Marked target deals 5% Plague damage to your Marked target.

entries.name: Shadewalker
entries.desc: Each time you consume a stack of Deathstalker's Mark, reduce the cooldown of Shadowstep by 3 sec.

entries.name: Shroud of Night
entries.desc: Shroud of Concealment duration increased by 5 sec.

entries.name: Momentum of Despair
entries.desc: If you have critically struck with Fan of Knives, increase the critical strike chance of Fan of Knives and Crimson Tempest by 10% and critical strike damage by 20% for 8 sec.

entries.name: Follow the Blood
entries.desc: Fan of Knives and Crimson Tempest deal 30% additional damage while 2 or more enemies are afflicted with Rupture.

entries.name: Hunt Them Down
entries.desc: Auto-attacks against Marked targets deal an additional 3 Plague damage.

entries.name: Unshakeable Drive
entries.desc: When you consume an application of Deathstalker's Mark, the damage of your next Ambush or Mutilate is increased by 50%.

entries.name: Deathstalker's Mark
entries.desc:
Garrote applies 3 stacks of Deathstalker's Mark to your target, unless Deathstalker's Mark is already active. You learn Mark for Death.

When you spend 5 or more combo points on attacks against a Marked target you consume an application of Deathstalker's Mark, dealing 54 Plague damage.


Mark for Death
Move your active Deathstalker's Mark to your target.

entries.name: Darkest Night
entries.desc:
When you consume the final Deathstalker's Mark from a target or your target dies, gain 30 Energy and Darkest Night, causing your next Envenom cast with 5 or more combo points to critically strike, deal 35% additional damage, and apply 3 stacks of Deathstalker's Mark to the target if no other Deathstalker's Mark is active.

Envenom cast with Darkest Night does not consume a stack of active Deathstalker's Marks.

entries.name: Mass Casualty
entries.desc: Deathstalker's Mark deals 40% of its normal damage to all other enemies within 8 yds that are afflicted by Rupture.

entries.name: Quietus Celeris
entries.desc: Deathstalker's Mark has a 30% chance to immediately consume a stack when applied.

entries.name: Precise Killer
entries.desc: Critical strike damage bonus increased by 20%.
